row.Notes: Founded 2006 in Vienna as JoinVision; subsidiary of JobCloud (Swiss leader) since 2016, now JobCloud HR Tech. Programmatic distribution partnership with Joveo (2019). Verified on https://joinvision.eu/en/ and https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/joinvision | Access detail: Paid (programmatic job-ad distribution + semantic parsing; subscription + usage)

row.Cost Details: Employers supply job ads and set a preferred CPC; ranking is bid/relevancy-based (bidding ladder). Also offers a fixed-fee subscription (unlimited postings for a flat monthly price). Dedicated account managers for larger clients.
row.Limitations / Rate Limits: Aggregates jobs from across the web; monetizes via CPC/subscription. Publisher/aggregator feed partnerships available; no documented public read-all API.
row.Notes: Meta-search job aggregator with CPC bidding ladder and a fixed-fee subscription alternative. Welcomes aggregator/publisher feeds. Verified on https://www.whatjobs.com/job-aggregators | Access detail: Paid (CPC bidding + fixed-fee subscription options)
row.Status: No Public Read API (aggregator; CPC feed-ingest)

row.Cost Details: CPC model; advertisers/job boards buy traffic and manage campaigns through Thribee across Trovit, Mitula, Nestoria and Nuroa. No public flat rate; feed-in + CPC bidding.
row.Limitations / Rate Limits: Aggregates listings from thousands of sources (jobs, homes, cars); monetizes via CPC. No public read-all job API for third parties.
row.Notes: Vertical-search aggregator acquired by LIFULL in 2014; jobs business acquired by Adzuna in March 2026. Traffic bought via Thribee on CPC. Verified on https://corporate.trovit.com/feed-in-jobs/ and https://www.lifullconnect.com/brands/thribee/ | Access detail: Paid (CPC traffic acquisition via Thribee)
row.Status: No Public Read API (aggregator; CPC feed-in)

row.Cost Details: CPC model; job boards/advertisers feed listings in and buy traffic via Thribee. No public flat rate.
row.Limitations / Rate Limits: Aggregates listings across jobs/homes/cars; monetizes via CPC. No public read-all job API.
row.Notes: Mitula Group (which also owned Nestoria/Lokku) merged with Trovit in 2019 to form LIFULL Connect; jobs business acquired by Adzuna March 2026. CPC via Thribee. Verified on https://www.lifullconnect.com/brands/mitula/ and https://www.lifullconnect.com/brands/thribee/ | Access detail: Paid (CPC traffic acquisition via Thribee)
row.Status: No Public Read API (aggregator; CPC feed-in)

row.Cost Details: Monetizes via referral fees paid by job boards and CPC/sponsored-featured placements paid by employers (AdWords-style bidding). No public flat rate.
row.Limitations / Rate Limits: Aggregates ~9M+ listings monthly across 22 countries / 9 languages using normalization + de-duplication; no public read-all job API.
row.Notes: Operating since 2007; part of LIFULL Connect vertical-search portfolio. ~9M monthly listings across 22 countries. Verified on https://www.jobboardfinder.com/jobboard-jobisjob-usa | Access detail: Paid (CPC / sponsored-listing referrals)
row.Status: No Public Read API (aggregator; CPC feed-in)

row.Cost Details: Recruiters sign up free and pay only for matches/performance; Lensa Connect lets third-party sites list Lensa jobs and monetize on a CPC basis (single opt-in US traffic only). No public flat rate.
row.Limitations / Rate Limits: Aggregates + republishes listings from external sources; CPC monetization restricted to single opt-in US traffic. No public read-all job API.
row.Notes: ML-driven US job aggregator, 20M+ registered users. Lensa Connect (CPC publisher network) restricted to single opt-in US traffic. Verified on https://lensa.com/ and https://hrtechfeed.com/lensa-connect-job-ads-on-demand/
row.Status: No Public Read API (aggregator; CPC feed-in)

row.Cost Details: Pay-for-performance: cost-per-click or cost-per-application; employers post free and pay only on click/completed application, setting their bid with a prediction engine. Industry-benchmark campaigns ~$150-$600/job/month; month-to-month, 30-day billing.
row.Limitations / Rate Limits: Distributes employer jobs on CPC/CPA (write-side). Separately offers a publisher Search API + XML feed so partner job boards can pull/display Talroo jobs — but Talroo is not currently onboarding new XML feeds.
row.Docs Available: Yes (developer docs at docs.talroo.com — Search API, XML feed, Ad Platform API)
row.Notes: Formerly Jobs2Careers. Dual model: employer CPC/CPA distribution AND a publisher Search API/XML feed for partner job boards (note: not onboarding new XML feeds currently). Pricing and API verified on https://www.talroo.com/pro/ and https://docs.talroo.com/api/search and https://docs.talroo.com/docs/resources/talroo-xml-feed | Access detail: Paid (pay-for-performance CPC/CPA) + publisher Search API
row.Status: Recommended (has publisher Search API; also CPC/CPA feed-ingest)
row.Unique Job Identifier: Yes (job IDs in XML feed / API)

row.Cost Details: Billable events are CPC, CPA, or as specified per insertion order. MaxRecruit distributes and optimizes ads across 30+ top job sites. Also subscription tools/analytics for employers. No public flat rate.
row.Primary Industry/Category: Online talent community + programmatic job distribution
row.Limitations / Rate Limits: Community-driven job marketplace; distributes employer jobs (write-side). No public read-all job API.
row.Notes: Founded 2015, Cambridge MA; social/community job network. MaxRecruit programmatic product distributes across 30+ sites on CPC/CPA per insertion order. Verified on https://www.partners.jobcase.com/products/maxrecruit and https://www.jobcase.com/about-us/jobcase-publisher-agreement/ | Access detail: Paid (programmatic job advertising, CPC/CPA)
row.Status: No Public Read API (feed-ingest / distribution only)

row.Cost Details: Employers choose CPC campaigns or flat-fee campaigns; self-serve budgets typically $50-$500 to promote ads. Syndicates jobs to 100+ job boards / job-alert network.
row.Limitations / Rate Limits: Syndicates employer jobs across 100+ sites (write-side). No public read-all job API.
row.Notes: Acquired by Jobcase in 2021. CPC or flat-fee syndication to 100+ boards/job-alert network. Verified on https://www.upward.net/employers and https://blog.upward.net/index.php/uncategorized/choosing-between-cpc-and-flat-fee/
row.Status: No Public Read API (feed-ingest / distribution only)

row.Cost Details: PPC email distribution; ZipRecruiter includes sponsored jobs in ZipAlerts emails to matched candidates. Priced by estimated additional visitors (e.g., 100/200/300 candidate tiers via TrafficBoost). Pay only for clicks/performance.
row.Limitations / Rate Limits: Email-alert PPC channel that drives candidates to the employer site; distinct from the ZipRecruiter posting API. No public read-all job API of its own.
row.Notes: ZipRecruiter's email-alert PPC product (TrafficBoost/ZipAlerts) — distinct from the already-cataloged ZipRecruiter posting API. Also monetized via an affiliate/publisher CPC program. Verified on https://www.zipalerts.com/ and https://www.staffingnerd.com/zip-recruiter-zip-alerts/
row.Status: No Public Read API (email PPC distribution)
row.Incremental Sync: Yes (job included in matched email alerts)

row.Cost Details: Paid subscription, custom-priced by company size, hiring needs, campaign volume, team size, and ATS integrations. Essential tier covers social ads, analytics, landing/career pages, ATS integration. Demo required for pricing.
row.Limitations / Rate Limits: Automates job advertising, employer branding, and candidate engagement across digital channels (write-side). No public read-all job API.
row.Notes: AI recruitment-marketing OS automating job advertising, employer branding, and candidate engagement across channels. Custom subscription pricing verified on https://www.smartdreamers.com/pricing and https://www.capterra.com/p/255591/Smartdreamers/ | Access detail: Paid (recruitment-marketing automation; subscription, custom)
row.Status: No Public Read API (feed-ingest / distribution only)

row.Cost Details: Job listings start ~$349/month; also pay-for-performance and pay-per-resume models. Talent Network (4,500+ career sites, 45M+ members, 29 languages) plus Broadbean distribution to 6,000+ boards.
row.Limitations / Rate Limits: Distributes employer jobs across its Talent Network + Broadbean (write-side). No public read-all job API for pulling all jobs.
row.Notes: CareerBuilder+Monster merged entity. Owns Broadbean (6,000+ board distribution). Talent Network of 4,500+ career sites / 45M members. Listings from ~$349/mo plus pay-for-performance / pay-per-resume. Verified on https://hiring.careerbuilder.com/talent-network and https://www.mightyrecruiter.com/job-posting-partners/careerbuilder/ | Access detail: Paid (job posting + programmatic distribution; subscription + pay-for-performance)
row.Status: No Public Read API (feed-ingest / distribution only)

row.Cost Details: No cost to be indexed; there is no submission fee and no ad-buying model within the feature itself. Employers/boards get listed by publishing crawlable pages with JobPosting structured data.
row.Auth Required: No (organic crawl; Search Console for monitoring)
row.Limitations / Rate Limits: Aggregation layer inside Google Search that crawls JobPosting schema.org markup across the open web. No public API to post jobs and no official public API to read/pull the aggregated results — the former Google Cloud Talent/Jobs API is discontinued; programmatic access only via scraping (against ToS).
row.Docs Available: Yes (JobPosting structured-data guidelines on Google Search Central)
row.Notes: Included for completeness: aggregates via schema.org JobPosting markup, not a feed you submit. No public read API (the old Cloud Talent/Jobs API was retired); no posting API. Verified on https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/job-posting and https://scrapfly.io/blog/posts/guide-to-google-jobs-api-and-alternatives | Access detail: Free to appear (organic, via schema.org markup); no paid or programmatic ingest API
row.Status: No Public Read API (schema.org crawl-based aggregator)
row.Additional Supported Regions: Most countries where Google Search operates

row.Cost Details: Jobs Scraper API $1 per 1,000 records (list), promo $0.75/1k; LinkedIn Jobs dataset purchase from $250 for 100K records (~$0.0025/rec), subscription discounts up to 80%; free tier 5,000 credits/mo (~$7.50), no card
row.Limitations / Rate Limits: Rate limits not published; handles up to 5,000 URLs per request; pay only for successful results; scraping-based, observe target ToS
row.Notes: Purpose-built Jobs Scraper API covering LinkedIn Jobs, Indeed, Glassdoor; also sells pre-built LinkedIn job datasets. Verified on brightdata.com/products/web-scraper/jobs-scraper, /linkedin/jobs, /datasets/linkedin, docs.brightdata.com
row.API Limits: Metered by record count; no published req/s cap

row.Cost Details: Web Scraper API monthly tiers: Micro $49/mo (from $0.50/1k results, ~98K results), Starter $99/mo (from $0.45/1k, 220K), Business $999/mo (from $0.30/1k, 3.33M), Custom+ (from $0.25/1k); JS-rendered targets $1.35/1k on Micro
row.Limitations / Rate Limits: 50 req/s (Micro/Starter), 100 req/s (Business/Custom+); scraping-based, observe target ToS
row.Notes: Dedicated Google Jobs and Indeed (by-URL) scraper endpoints; no LinkedIn/Glassdoor jobs product. Verified on oxylabs.io/products/scraper-api/web/pricing and developers.oxylabs.io
row.API Limits: 50-100 req/s depending on tier; metered by results

row.Cost Details: Usage-based Zyte API; base request cost varies by target/features (exact per-1k not published); automatic extraction $0.0004-$0.0016 per data type (job-listing schema), screenshots $0.002, custom attributes $0.001; free credit $5 first month (Standard), $200 (Enterprise); commitment tiers 25-52% discount
row.Limitations / Rate Limits: Governed by spending limits rather than fixed req/s; scraping-based
row.Notes: AutoExtract supports a built-in job-listing schema (no parser needed); no named LinkedIn/Indeed product. Exact per-1k base rate not verifiable on official pages. Verified on docs.zyte.com/zyte-api/pricing.html, zyte.com/pricing
row.API Limits: Spend-limit based; no fixed req/s published

row.Cost Details: Free 1,000 credits/mo (5 concurrent); Hobby $49/mo (100K credits); Startup $149/mo (1M); Business $299/mo (3M); Enterprise custom. Credit cost: standard page 1, Amazon 5, Google 25, LinkedIn 30; +10 JS render, +10 premium proxies; no rollover
row.Limitations / Rate Limits: Concurrency-based (5 free, higher on paid); no per-second cap documented; no purpose-built jobs product
row.Notes: Generic scraping proxy; no dedicated jobs endpoint but LinkedIn billed at 30 credits/req. Usable to scrape job boards. Verified on scraperapi.com/pricing and docs.scraperapi.com

row.Cost Details: Platform: Free $0/mo ($5 usage included), Starter $29/mo, Scale $199/mo, Business $999/mo; compute $0.2-$0.13 per CU. Job Actors: bebity/linkedin-jobs-scraper $29.99/mo rental+usage (max 1,000 rows/run); curious_coder/linkedin-jobs-search-scraper $30/mo rental+usage; misceres/indeed-scraper pay-per-result from $3.00 per 1,000 listings
row.Limitations / Rate Limits: Plan concurrency/compute budget; per-actor row caps (e.g. 1,000 rows/run); scraping-based, observe target ToS
row.Notes: Marketplace of third-party Actors; strongest purpose-built LinkedIn Jobs + Indeed scrapers of the scraping group. Verified on apify.com/pricing and the named actor pages
row.API Limits: Plan compute budget; concurrency by tier

row.Cost Details: Free 200 credits/mo (concurrency 1); Lite $40/mo (200K, c5); Standard $90/mo (1M, c50); Pro $200/mo (3M, c100); Premium $350/mo (6M, c150); Business $500/mo (9M, c200), scaling to $30,000/mo. Credit cost: rotating proxy 1, JS 5, premium 10, LinkedIn Post API 25, LinkedIn Profile 50; failed requests auto-refunded
row.Limitations / Rate Limits: Concurrency-based per plan; no per-second cap; no verified purpose-built jobs product
row.Notes: Has LinkedIn Post/Profile APIs but no verified dedicated LinkedIn Jobs or Indeed jobs product; usable for scraping job sites. Verified on scrapingdog.com/pricing

row.Cost Details: Free $0 (1,000 credits, c1); Startup $49/mo (200K, c15); Business $99/mo (1M, c30); Enterprise $249/mo (3M, c50). Web scraping $0.08/1k; Indeed Jobs API ~$0.37-$2.45 per 1,000 rows (10 credits/row); Glassdoor Jobs API $0.75/1k; only successful results charged
row.Notes: Dedicated Indeed Jobs API and Glassdoor Jobs API (title, company, location, salary, job type, benefits); 60+ locales; no LinkedIn Jobs scraper. Verified on hasdata.com/prices, hasdata.com/apis/indeed-api, docs.hasdata.com

row.Cost Details: Free trial 500 credits (no card); Premium $49/mo (18K credits, 7 req/s, $2.72/1k standard); Premium+ $99/mo (40K, 10 req/s); Startup $249/mo (110K, 15 req/s). Scraper APIs from $1.88/1k, headless from $3.76/1k, Web Unblocker from $5.64/1k; Indeed Job Info API 2 credits/request; job-posting datasets priced separately (~$3,000/mo, search-reported)
row.Notes: Extensive job endpoints: Indeed Job Info, Glassdoor Job Info, LinkedIn Job Search, LinkedIn Job Suggest, plus a Job Posting Dataset. Verified on piloterr.com/pricing, piloterr.com/library/indeed-job-info

row.Cost Details: Free trial 5,000 pages. PAYG: Agent API $3/1k pages, Search API $5/1k inputs, Extract/Crawl/Map $0.90/1k URLs (standard), $1.30/1k (JS), $1.45/1k (JS+stealth). Managed annual: Startup $2,500/mo (350K pages), Scale $7,000/mo (1.2M), Professional $15,000/mo (3M), Enterprise custom
row.Limitations / Rate Limits: No explicit req/s for PAYG; managed gated by concurrent-agent count; no jobs vertical
row.Notes: General-purpose web scraping/search agent; no LinkedIn/Indeed scraper or jobs vertical, so limited job-aggregation value. Verified on nimbleway.com/pricing, docs.nimbleway.com
row.API Limits: PAYG metered by pages; managed by agent concurrency

row.Cost Details: Job Data API EUR0.002 per job record (metered via RapidAPI); datafeeds from EUR333/month per country; AWS Data Exchange EUR4,800/year per country; Luxembourg datafeed free via AWS DX; RapidAPI free tier ~250 jobs/month
row.Limitations / Rate Limits: Metered by request count; rate limits not disclosed; API exposes last ~3 months
row.Notes: Crawls 1,800+ sources; JSON-LD postings; formats JSON/CSV/RSS/XML/Parquet; also jobdatafeeds.com. Verified on techmap.io/pricing, techmap.io/faq, api.techmap.io

row.Cost Details: 100 credits/month free; Tier 1 (101-5k) $0.04/credit, $40/mo min; Tier 2 (5k-10k) $0.02/credit; Tier 3 (10k-100k) $0.01/credit; Tier 4 (100k-500k) $0.004/credit; Tier 5 (500k+) $0.002/credit. 1 request = 1 credit (up to 1,000 records); no rollover; Enterprise custom flat-file (S3/GCS/SFTP, data from 2015)
row.Limitations / Rate Limits: Rate limits documented but exact numbers gated; credits do not roll over
row.Notes: Job Openings Dataset sourced from company career pages, 2.7M companies. Verified on predictleads.com/pricing, docs.predictleads.com/guide/job_openings_dataset/introduction
row.Unique Job Identifier: Yes (job-opening ID; retrieve single opening by ID)

row.Cost Details: Basic EUR99/mo (500 credits, ~EUR0.198/credit), +EUR34/mo per extra user; Starter EUR190/mo (1,000 credits, ~EUR0.190/credit), +EUR68/mo per extra user; Custom/Enterprise. 7-day free trial, 50 free credits; 1 credit per company/account found (browsing unlimited)
row.Limitations / Rate Limits: Rate limits not documented; annual commitment
row.Notes: Worldwide postings across multiple boards, 20+ data points, plus LinkedIn job/company/hiring-contact enrichment. Verified on mantiks.io/pricing, mantiks.io/job-postings-api, mantiks-api.readme.io/reference

row.Cost Details: Free tier + Pro (~$98/mo person, ~$100/mo company per search snippets, not page-verified) + Enterprise custom; 1 credit per successful record; Enterprise routing above 100k credits
row.Limitations / Rate Limits: Fixed-window per-endpoint rate limits (exact RPM/RPS gated, 403); 1MB response cap; ~50 records/request recommended; credit headers x-call-credits-spent, x-totallimit-remaining
row.Notes: Dedicated Job Posting Search API (/v5/job_posting/search), Beta, refreshed daily; fields include title class/role/seniority, PDL Company ID, location, salary, skills, remote flag. Dollar prices are search-snippet, not page-verified. Verified on docs.peopledatalabs.com/docs/job-posting-data-overview, /docs/usage-limits

row.Cost Details: Free $0/mo (10,000 credits/mo); Startup $299/mo (250,000 credits, $0.001/credit); Plus $899/mo (1,000,000 credits, $0.0009/credit); Enterprise custom. Extract 1 page = 1 credit; Export 1 KG entity = 25 credits
row.Limitations / Rate Limits: Free 5 calls/min; Startup 5 calls/sec; Plus 25 calls/sec; Enterprise 25+/sec
row.Notes: Dedicated Job API extracts structured postings (title, datePosted, employer, salary, locations, remote, skills, requirements) on-demand from a given URL; not a bulk pre-collected dataset. Verified on diffbot.com/pricing, docs.diffbot.com/reference/job
row.Date-based Sync: datePosted field present; no sync mechanism documented

row.Cost Details: Launch plan free for first 3 production Linked Accounts; $650/mo for up to 10 Linked Accounts; $65 per additional account beyond 10; Professional and Enterprise contract-based
row.Notes: Unified ATS API (candidates, jobs, applications) across many ATS systems; cost scales with customer connections not job volume. Verified on merge.dev/pricing/unified, docs.merge.dev/merge-unified/ats/overview
row.API Limits: 100-600 req/min per Linked Account by tier

row.Cost Details: No dollar figures published; fixed annual platform fee + variable per-customer-connection fee; three tiers (Start/Scale/Enterprise) all route to demo; free POC sandbox
row.Limitations / Rate Limits: 300 requests / 60s per environment; HTTP 429 with ratelimit-* headers
row.Notes: HR-tech unified API (HRIS+ATS+Assessment+LMS, 200+ systems); full ATS coverage (jobs incl. salary, candidates, applications, interviews, offers). Pricing quote-only. Verified on kombo.dev/pricing, docs.kombo.dev/introduction

row.Cost Details: Usage-based: Grow $750/mo for 750,000 API calls, $1.00 per additional 1,000 calls; Scale $3,000/mo for 6M calls; free start available. Each pagination page counts as a call (tier dollars from a third-party 2026 breakdown; usage-based model corroborated on unified.to)
row.Auth Required: Yes (OAuth per integration; connection_id in calls)
row.Limitations / Rate Limits: Rate limits not documented on pages viewed
row.Notes: Unified API with dedicated ATS API (9 objects incl. Jobs, Candidates, Applications, Interviews, Scorecards) across 85+ ATS integrations (Greenhouse, Lever, Workday, iCIMS, Ashby). Verified on docs.unified.to/ats/overview, unified.to/pricing

row.Cost Details: 30-day free trial; Launch EUR599/mo (1 category, from 25 consumers); Scale EUR1,299/mo (3 categories, from 100 consumers); Enterprise custom (unlimited categories, from 300 consumers); consumer-based pricing (unlimited calls/connectors per consumer)
row.Notes: Unified ATS API with Jobs, Applicants, Applications (full CRUD) across 11 ATS connectors (Bullhorn, Greenhouse, JobAdder, Lever, Workable, Workday, etc.). Verified on apideck.com/pricing, apideck.com/ats-api, developers.apideck.com/apis/ats/reference

row.Cost Details: Freemium: Basic $0 (~100-200 requests/mo, hard-capped); Pro $25/mo (~10,000 requests, +$0.003/extra); Ultra $75/mo (~50,000, +$0.002/extra); Mega $150/mo (~200,000, +$0.001/extra). Paid-tier quotas best-estimate (RapidAPI pricing tab is JS SPA)
row.Auth Required: Yes (X-RapidAPI-Key; OpenWeb Ninja portal uses x-api-key)
row.Limitations / Rate Limits: ~1,000 req/hour on free plan (RapidAPI rule); per-second RPS per tier not confirmed
row.Notes: Flagship RapidAPI product of OpenWeb Ninja aggregating Google for Jobs, LinkedIn, Indeed, Glassdoor, ZipRecruiter; endpoints Search Jobs, Job Details, Estimated Salary. Distinct listing from the OpenWeb Ninja entry already in catalog. Verified on rapidapi.com/letscrape-6bRBa3QguO5/api/jsearch, openwebninja.com/api/jsearch
row.API Limits: Monthly request quota per tier + hourly cap

row.Cost Details: No published pricing; contact-sales / schedule-a-demo only; no free tier (third-party estimates ~$10K/yr+ not vendor-confirmed)
row.Limitations / Rate Limits: Governed by each connected app's own API; connector-by-connector (not a normalized ATS schema)
row.Notes: iPaaS with 1,200+ connectors; ATS access via connectors (Greenhouse connector covers candidates, applications, jobs, offers, interviews, scorecards) rather than a unified schema. Verified on workato.com/pricing, docs.workato.com/connectors/greenhouse.html
